CREATE TABLE networks (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ip inet);
SELECT sys.text(ip) FROM networks WHERE id = 1;
SELECT sys.text(ip) FROM networks WHERE ip = inet '10.0.0.1';
SELECT sys.text(ip) FROM networks WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM networks WHERE ip != inet '192.168.1.5');
SELECT n.id, sys.text(n.ip) FROM networks n JOIN (SELECT id FROM networks WHERE id < 3) AS sub ON n.id = sub.id;
CREATE TABLE ip_addresses (address inet, description VARCHAR(255));
SELECT sys.text(address) AS text_representation FROM ip_addresses WHERE description LIKE 'Internal%';
SELECT n.id, sys.text(n.ip), p.description FROM networks n LEFT JOIN ip_addresses p ON n.ip = p.address;
SELECT DISTINCT sys.text(ip) FROM networks UNION SELECT sys.text(address) FROM ip_addresses;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT sys.text(ip) FROM networks) AS t;
SELECT n.id, (SELECT sys.text(n2.ip) FROM networks n2 WHERE n2.id = n.id + 1) AS next_ip FROM networks n WHERE n.id < 3;
